title: Sandbox deploy executor
description: Builds the project image locally with podman, pushes it to the container registry, imports it into the sandbox namespace, and rolls out the deployment.

sandboxProject.description: The OpenShift namespace to deploy the sandbox into.

registry.description: Container registry the sandbox image is published to (e.g. ghcr.io/my-org).

database.description: Provision a shared sandbox database of this type before deploying.

appType.description: Application type. Detected from the project configuration when omitted.

imageTag.description: Image tag pushed and imported into the namespace imagestream.

skipBuild.description: Skip the nx build + podman build steps and reuse the already-built image (resume a partial deploy).

skipPush.description: Skip the registry login + push and reuse the already-pushed image (resume from the import step).

importRetries.description: How many times to retry oc import-image (absorbs the 409 from oc tag's async reconcile).
